question: What is the name and model year of the vehicle which has been rented the most times?
sql: SELECT Vehicles.name, Vehicles.Model_year FROM Vehicles INNER JOIN Renting_history ON Vehicles.id = Renting_history.vehicles_id GROUP BY Vehicles.id ORDER BY COUNT(Renting_history.id) DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 查找租赁记录最多的车辆名称和型号年份

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致，SQL反向翻译描述准确反映了原始问题的意图，即查找被租赁次数最多的车辆的名称和型号年份。
